category_sources: source_facts.description says Chaos Client communicates with Chaos DB API; official ProjectDiscovery docs describe Chaos as a DNS dataset/API and official GitHub README describes subdomain enumeration usage.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is chaos-client; official GitHub README heading is Chaos Client and docs call it ProjectDiscovery’s Chaos Client.
docs_sources: Official ProjectDiscovery docs provide dedicated Chaos overview, install, and running pages; official GitHub README documents installation, flags, API key, and library usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/projectdiscovery/chaos-client; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official ProjectDiscovery docs describe Chaos as a DNS entries dataset/API; official GitHub README shows subdomain lookup, API key usage, CLI flags, and Go client usage.
